name: finclaw-starter
description: FinClaw starter workspace with finance-focused defaults

cron.prompt: Morning brief: Call fin_fund_status, summarize overnight activity, identify strategies needing attention. Send the brief via message_send.
cron.name: morning-brief

cron.prompt: Ideation scan: Call fin_ideation_trigger to scan markets for new strategy opportunities. Report any promising ideas found.
cron.name: ideation-scan

cron.prompt: Evolution check: Call fin_evolution_scan to detect alpha decay in active strategies. Recommend evolution or retirement for degrading alphas.
cron.name: evolution-check

cron.prompt: Evening review: Call fin_leaderboard and fin_list_promotions_ready. Analyze top/bottom performers, recommend promotions. Send summary via message_send.
cron.name: evening-review

cron.prompt: Weekly rebalance: Call fin_fund_status, fin_leaderboard, fin_fund_rebalance. Compile a comprehensive weekly performance report covering returns, risk metrics, strategy lifecycle changes, and capital allocation. Send via message_send.
cron.name: weekly-rebalance
